name: Database Health Monitoring
description: Scheduled database health monitoring that checks connection pool utilization, replication lag, query performance, and storage capacity across all production databases. AI analysis identifies trending issues and provides optimization recommendations. Critical issues such as replication failures or connection pool exhaustion trigger immediate alerting and incident creation. Healthy checks are logged for compliance.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Datadog
required_integrations.reason: Collect database performance metrics including connection pools, replication lag, and query times

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create incident tickets for critical database health issues

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Alert the DBA and infrastructure teams of database health issues

config.description: Runs every 30 minutes to check health metrics across all production databases
Collect comprehensive database health metrics including connection pools, replication, query performance, and storage

config.additional_instructions: Analyze database health metrics. Flag critical issues: replication lag above 30 seconds, connection pool above 80%, query times above 500ms, storage above 85%. Identify trends and provide optimization recommendations.
config.description: AI-powered database health assessment identifying issues, trends, and optimization opportunities
Determine if the AI assessment identified any critical database health issues requiring immediate action

parameters.description:
Automated database health check detected critical issues.

Affected Instances: {{analyze_1.affected_instances}}

Metrics Summary:
- Connection Pool: {{db_metrics.connection_pool_usage}}%
- Replication Lag: {{db_metrics.replication_lag_seconds}}s
- Avg Query Time: {{db_metrics.avg_query_time_ms}}ms
- Storage Used: {{db_metrics.storage_used_pct}}%
- Deadlocks/min: {{db_metrics.deadlocks_per_min}}
- Cache Hit Ratio: {{db_metrics.cache_hit_ratio}}%

Riggs Assessment:
{{analyze_1.summary}}

config.description: Create a critical incident ticket for the database health issues requiring immediate DBA attention
Send urgent Slack notification to the DBA team about critical database health issues

parameters.note:
Database health check completed at {{trigger_1.timestamp}}. All production databases reporting healthy.

Summary: {{analyze_1.summary}}

config.description: Log that all databases passed the health check for compliance audit trail
